nasb.text: He also defiled Topheth, which is in the valley of the son of Hinnom, that no man might make his son or his daughter pass through the fire for Molech.

esv.text: And he defiled Topheth, which is in the Valley of the Son of Hinnom, that no one might burn his son or his daughter as an offering to Molech.

cnv.text: 他又污穢在欣嫩子谷的陀斐特，不許人在那裡將兒女焚燒獻給摩洛。

ccb.text: 他污渎欣嫩子谷中的陀斐特，使人们不能焚烧自己的儿女献给摩洛。
